title: 22 Tex. Admin. Code § 1.23 - Application Process
text:
(a) An Applicant
for architectural registration by examination must apply through NCARB. The
Applicant is responsible for having NCARB transmit to the Board a completed
application with all required supporting documentation.
source_note:
22
Tex. Admin. Code §
1.23

The provisions of
this §1.23 adopted to be effective October 10, 2001, 26 TexReg
7836
